message:
feat(db,storage): expand search_v3 no-op stubs for bench/test compilation and storage hardening

DB (lib.rs):
- Adjust conditional compilation gate on search_v3 module to ensure
  the no-op TantivyBridge stub covers all downstream dependents.

DB (benches/search_v3_bench.rs, tests/query_integration.rs,
    tests/search_quality.rs):
- Add feature-gate annotations and stub imports so benchmarks and
  integration tests compile cleanly when tantivy-engine is disabled.
  This prevents CI failures on minimal feature builds.

Storage (lib.rs):
- Additional archive management improvements: extended path
  canonicalization, symlink detection edge cases, and commit queue
  normalization refinements (~110 lines of hardening from concurrent
  development).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
